location: Inside a chest on the back of a horse-drawn carriage at a guarded camp south of the Outer Wall Phantom Tree Site of Grace in Altus Plateau.

source.name: Carriage chest at the Altus Plateau camp

tactics: Approaching the camp triggers a Lesser Ulcerated Tree Spirit, which bursts from the ground and can wreck the camp's soldiers itself — be ready to fight or dodge past it
You can bypass the fight entirely by skirting the camp and jumping straight onto the back of the carriage to open the chest
The camp's regular soldiers are also a threat if you engage head-on instead of taking the stealth route
lore: A hammer hewn from a single boulder, once used in the ancient war against the Giants; after their fall, humanity turned to fighting itself and mostly forgot such weapons, having grown far weaker than its ancestors.

builds.name: Pure Strength colossal build
builds.why: C-scaling Strength and one of the highest base attack values among strike colossals make it a top pick for a maximum-Strength, stance-breaking build.
